timing_policy.method: Generate one natural Traditional Chinese utterance per segment, place it at the segment start, and preserve silence between segments.
fit_order: Tighten the Traditional Chinese wording without changing meaning.
Regenerate with pronunciation or punctuation adjustments.
Apply no more than 10 percent time compression when editorial changes cannot solve the overrun.
do_not: Synthesize each original VTT cue as a separate utterance.
Move narration across a visual transition without reviewing the picture.
Leave the original English narration audible beneath the Traditional Chinese voice.

audio_mix.method: The source audio stream is not mapped. The aligned Traditional Chinese voice-only master is mixed over viacheslavstarostin-educational-presentation-tutorial-music-357862.mp3, normalized to -27 LUFS. Music fades in, sidechain-ducks beneath actual narration, restores between phrases, and fades over the video's final four seconds.
audio_mix.review_warning: Confirm narration level, music balance, ducking transitions, and the final fade. The mix contains no original source-language audio.

editorial_notes: Corrected clear AI-caption recognition errors before Korean translation.
Preserved technical values, acronyms, product names, and the confirmed Scale/확장성 OCP tenet.

segments.english: In 2011, we opened the black box and shared the blueprints. But blueprints do not build themselves.
segments.chinese: 2011 年，我們開啟黑盒並公開了設計藍圖。但藍圖不會自己變成產品。

segments.english: To actually change the industry, we needed an innovation engine powered by openness. What we needed was a community.
segments.chinese: 要真正改變行業，我們需要一個由開放驅動的創新引擎。我們需要的是社群。

segments.english: Today, the Open Compute Project is not just a library of specifications. It is a living community driven by a shared goal: creating open solutions for data center operators facing extreme scaling challenges.
segments.chinese: 如今，Open Compute Project 不只是一座規範庫，而是一個圍繞共同目標運轉的活躍社群：為面臨極端擴充套件挑戰的資料中心運營商創造開放解決方案。

segments.english: Putting thousands of engineers in one room produces many great ideas, but that brainpower must be properly channeled.
segments.chinese: 讓數千名工程師匯聚在一起會產生許多好想法，但這些智慧必須得到有效組織。

segments.english: The work of OCP happens in specialized project groups. Think of them as engineering departments.
segments.chinese: OCP 的工作在專業專案組中開展。您可以把它們看作工程部門。

segments.english: Some teams focus entirely on Rack & Power, others on Cooling Environments, and still others write open-source networking specifications. There are many more.
segments.chinese: 有些團隊專注於機架與電源，有些專注於冷卻環境，還有一些負責制定開源網路規範，除此之外還有許多專案。

segments.english: This is where the magic happens.
segments.chinese: 真正的創新就在這裡發生。

segments.english: We put the hyperscaler that builds and operates these massive data centers in the same room as the vendor that builds the hardware and the industry using that equipment.
segments.chinese: 我們把建設和運營大型資料中心的超大規模企業、製造硬體的供應商，以及使用這些裝置的行業使用者聚到一起。

segments.english: They debate physics, iterate on designs, and solve problems together before a single piece of metal is stamped.
segments.chinese: 在一塊金屬真正投入衝壓生產之前，他們就共同討論工程原理、反覆改進設計並解決問題。

segments.english: But it is not the Wild West. Before any design becomes an official OCP specification, it must pass the technical gatekeepers: the Steering Committee.
segments.chinese: 但這裡並非毫無規則。任何設計成為正式 OCP 規範之前，都必須透過技術把關者，也就是指導委員會的稽核。

segments.english: They are a panel of elected industry experts who rigorously review every submission.
segments.chinese: 指導委員會由選舉產生的行業專家組成，負責嚴格審查每一項提交。

segments.english: If a design does not meet the strict tenets of efficiency, impact, openness, scale, and sustainability, it goes straight back to the drawing board.
segments.chinese: 如果設計不符合效率、影響力、開放性、規模和可持續性這些嚴格準則，就必須回到設計階段重新改進。

segments.english: Once the committee approves the specification, it is locked in.
segments.chinese: 指導委員會批准後，規範便正式定稿。

segments.english: Vendors can then manufacture the physical hardware, earn the OCP Accepted mark, and list it on the OCP Marketplace for the world to see, buy, and deploy.
segments.chinese: 隨後，供應商可以製造實體硬體，獲得 OCP Accepted 標識，並在 OCP Marketplace 上釋出，供全球使用者檢視、採購和部署。

segments.english: The community identifies the bottleneck, the project groups design the solution, and the committee ensures quality.
segments.chinese: 社群識別瓶頸，專案組設計解決方案，指導委員會保障質量。

segments.english: That is how we move the industry forward.
segments.chinese: 這就是我們推動行業前進的方式。

segments.english: Now that you know how the engine works, let us talk about my favorite topic: hardware.
segments.chinese: 現在，您已經瞭解這個創新引擎如何運轉。接下來，讓我們談談我最喜歡的話題：硬體。

language_policy.acronyms: Keep OCP, AI, ORv3, HPR, DLC, D2C, CDU, CPU, and GPU in Latin letters in visible captions and TTS scripts.
language_policy.numbers: Preserve every source year, percentage, voltage, power value, and monetary value exactly.
language_policy.tone: Warm, authoritative, concise, and natural for spoken Traditional Chinese.
